_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: MineTracker
author: imdani163@gmail.com
description: MineTracker — Real-time Minecraft server tracker. Runs the NestJS API and Next.js frontend in the same container. SQLite included, Redis optional.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
cd /mnt/server

echo "[1/8] Installing pnpm..."
npm install -g pnpm@11 --quiet

echo "[2/8] Creating data directory..."
mkdir -p data

echo "[3/8] Installing dependencies..."
pnpm install

echo "[4/8] Writing environment config..."
cat > apps/api/.env << ENVEOF
DATABASE_URL="file:/home/container/data/db.sqlite"
REDIS_URL="${REDIS_URL}"
JWT_SECRET="${JWT_SECRET}"
JWT_EXPIRES_IN="8h"
ADMIN_EMAIL="${ADMIN_EMAIL}"
ADMIN_PASSWORD="${ADMIN_PASSWORD}"
NODE_ENV="production"
API_PORT=${API_PORT}
CORS_ORIGINS="${APP_URL}"
APP_URL="${APP_URL}"
API_URL="http://localhost:${API_PORT}"
NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL="http://localhost:${API_PORT}"
NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL="${APP_URL}"
ENABLE_SERVER_SUBMISSIONS=${ENABLE_SERVER_SUBMISSIONS}
SUBMISSION_RATE_LIMIT_PER_HOUR=5
REQUIRE_ADMIN_APPROVAL=true
PING_INTERVAL_SECONDS=${PING_INTERVAL_SECONDS}
PING_CONCURRENCY=${PING_CONCURRENCY}
PING_TIMEOUT_MS=5000
IP_HASH_SALT="${IP_HASH_SALT}"
ENVEOF

echo "[5/8] Generating Prisma client..."
DATABASE_URL="file:/home/container/data/db.sqlite" pnpm --filter @minetracker/api exec prisma generate

echo "[6/8] Running database migrations..."
DATABASE_URL="file:/home/container/data/db.sqlite" pnpm --filter @minetracker/api exec prisma migrate deploy

echo "[7/8] Seeding admin user..."
ADMIN_EMAIL="${ADMIN_EMAIL}" ADMIN_PASSWORD="${ADMIN_PASSWORD}" DATABASE_URL="file:/home/container/data/db.sqlite" pnpm --filter @minetracker/api exec prisma db seed

echo "[8/8] Building apps..."
pnpm --filter @minetracker/shared build
pnpm --filter @minetracker/api build
NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL="http://localhost:${API_PORT}" NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL="${APP_URL}" pnpm --filter @minetracker/web build

cat > /mnt/server/start.sh << 'STARTEOF'
#!/bin/bash
cd /home/container

set -a
source apps/api/.env
set +a

echo "==> Starting MineTracker API on port $API_PORT..."
node apps/api/dist/main.js &
API_PID=$!

echo "==> Starting MineTracker Web on port $WEB_PORT..."
cd apps/web && PORT=$WEB_PORT node_modules/.bin/next start -p $WEB_PORT &
WEB_PID=$!

echo "==> MineTracker running | API: $API_PORT | Web: $WEB_PORT"
wait $API_PID $WEB_PID
STARTEOF

chmod +x /mnt/server/start.sh
echo "Installation complete!"

variables.name: Web Port
variables.description: Puerto del frontend Next.js. Debe coincidir con la asignación de puertos del servidor.

variables.name: API Port
variables.description: Puerto interno de la API NestJS. No necesita ser público si usas el proxy de Next.js.

variables.name: App URL
variables.description: URL pública del sitio web. Ej: https://tracker.tudominio.com

variables.name: JWT Secret
variables.description: Clave secreta para firmar tokens JWT. Usa al menos 64 caracteres aleatorios.

variables.name: IP Hash Salt
variables.description: Salt para hashear las IPs de los usuarios. Usa al menos 32 caracteres aleatorios.

variables.name: Admin Email
variables.description: Email del administrador creado al instalar.

variables.name: Admin Password
variables.description: Contraseña del administrador creado al instalar.

variables.name: Redis URL
variables.description: URL de Redis para BullMQ y caché. Deja vacío para usar el modo sin Redis (cola en memoria).

variables.name: Ping Interval (segundos)
variables.description: Cada cuántos segundos se comprueba el estado de cada servidor Minecraft.

variables.name: Ping Concurrency
variables.description: Número de pings simultáneos al monitorear servidores. Aumentar con Redis activado.

variables.name: Habilitar Submissions
variables.description: Permite que usuarios envíen nuevos servidores para revisión.
